title: US and Japan Deploy Elite Troops in Joint Exercise with V-22 Ospreys
summary: US forces and Japan Self-Defense Force conducted a joint operation deploying elite troops using V-22 Ospreys, Chinooks, and Super Stallions.
contents:
# US and Japan Deploy Elite Troops in Joint Exercise with V-22 Ospreys

## Overview
US forces and Japan Self-Defense Force conducted a joint operation deploying elite troops using V-22 Ospreys, Chinooks, and Super Stallions.

## Details
The exercise featured US-Japan elite troops transported by the "Giant Transformer" V-22 Osprey tiltrotor aircraft alongside Chinook and Super Stallion helicopters. It highlights deepening military cooperation between US forces in Japan and JSDF amid Indo-Pacific tensions. Specific locations within Japan got not detailed, but it aligns with ongoing joint exercises.

## Location
Japan

## Source Context
Reporting referenced from coverage tracked by the @USForcesJapan OSINT beat. The cited outlet provides additional context, attribution, and verification of the claims summarized above.

## Tags
US-Japan, JSDF, joint exercise, V-22 Osprey, elite troops, Indo-Pacific, military deployment
